name: claude-panel
description: Prevention-first agentic development: a YAGNI gate before code, adversarial multi-model review, and disciplined finding-tracking — composed on top of the official feature-dev workflow.

plugins.name: panel
plugins.description: Prevention-first development panel: ponytail-guard YAGNI gate, spec-strategist, deterministic two-commit TDD, cross-model adversarial review (Claude + DeepSeek), and a single edited-in-place findings ledger with auto-filed tracking issues. Wraps the official feature-dev workflow rather than reinventing it.
